title: Team thinking, visualized by Claude
summary: Anthropic's Claude AI was used by the Williams F1 Team to visualize the thinking patterns of drivers and pit crew under race conditions. The "Pattern of Thought" project captured cognitive data and transformed it into visual designs displayed on helmets, race suits, and garage displays at Monaco.
